summary: Hyperparameter Tuning feature VERIFIED - All 6 classification algorithms (logistic_regression, decision_tree, random_forest, knn, svm, naive_bayes) now appear in Tune view with correct tunable parameters. Naive Bayes shows 'Variance Smoothing' parameter, Logistic Regression shows 3 parameters (Learning Rate, Epochs, Regularization L2). Tuning runs successfully and produces improvement results.

critical_code_review_comments: HYPERPARAMETER_DEFS in mlEngine.js correctly includes naive_bayes with smoothing parameter (0.0001 to 1.0)
HYPERPARAMETER_DEFS correctly includes logistic_regression with 3 parameters: learningRate, epochs, lambda (L2)
trainLogisticRegression function now implements proper gradient descent with configurable learning rate, epochs, and L2 regularization
trainNaiveBayes function now accepts smoothing parameter for variance smoothing
buildModelWithParams correctly passes hyperparameters to training functions
TuneView.js tunableAlgos filter correctly identifies algorithms with HYPERPARAMETER_DEFS entries
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Loan Approval sample dataset
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hyperparameter Tuning feature fully verified. All 6 classification algorithms (logistic_regression, decision_tree, random_forest, knn, svm, naive_bayes) now appear in Tune view. The fix added HYPERPARAMETER_DEFS entries for naive_bayes (smoothing param) and logistic_regression (learningRate, epochs, lambda). Also implemented proper gradient descent for logistic regression. Tuning works correctly - tested with KNN which improved from 37.92% to 40.83% accuracy with k=27.

feature_verification.feature_description: Hyperparameter Tuning view was missing Naive Bayes and Logistic Regression algorithms
feature_verification.fix_applied: Added HYPERPARAMETER_DEFS entries for naive_bayes and logistic_regression, implemented proper gradient descent for logistic regression
feature_verification.verification_result: VERIFIED - All 6 classification algorithms now appear with correct tunable parameters
